title: CREATE+++++++ MODPACK
description: This project is based around the create mod and adding to features to make the game funner. It is heavily based off of StormDragon64's modpack(all credit goes to him) but it is in a more recent minecraft version.
body:
The main point of this modpack is to add stuff to the game sto make it run faster, be funner, and make it more interesting. There are a few parts of te mod pack which I explain below

# Create
Create is a mod that adds industrialization to the game. It allows you to automate many materials with 100s of new items. Other than base create, I also added other create mods that add more recipes, enchantments to create, and QoL items. Create adds new materials and prgression to make the game much more interesting, less grindy, and more advanced.

# Optimization
I also added a few optimization mods, with the whole points being to make the game run faster, use less resources, and load faster. 

# QoL
The quality of life mods I added include easy villagers, which allow you to pick up villagers and put them in your inventory and allows you to click a button to refresh trades. I also added a falling tree mo to allow more effiecient wood collecting(this can be laggy sometimes, so if you crash when you punch down a tree, delete this mod). Furthermore, Sophisitcated Backpacks gives you more storage and abilities, allowing you to adventure for longer and worry less about inventory space. There is also Xaero's mods of maps to make sure you don't get lost.

# More Adventure
I used many of Yungs mods to upgrade many older structures such as desert temples and ocean monuments. This makes the structures larger and funner, especially with friends. Using essential mod you can host friends to your worlds with just the click of a button all for free. There are also 2 custom music disc and paintings mods for better decorations.

# Looking cool 
I added a lot of shaderpacks and mods to gam eth egame look cooler while barely losing fps. To enable all of them go to settings, resource packs, and enable all of them except for UI contrast and classic minecraft. Then go to video settings and shaders and apply th eshaders.

This is just an overview of the mods I added, and there ar emany more I have not talked about. To leanr more, check out the mods. For any questions visit the discord. Do the same if you have any feedback, as it is all greatly appreciated. Have fun!
